title: Full Pattern — Inventory API
description:
### Your Task

Build an Inventory API using ALL patterns: Entity + Service + DTO + Custom Queries.

### Requirements

- `InventoryItem` entity: `id` (Long), `name` (String), `category` (String), `quantity` (Integer), `unitPrice` (Double), `supplier` (String)
- `InventoryRequestDTO`: `name`, `category`, `quantity`, `unitPrice`, `supplier`
- `InventoryResponseDTO`: `id`, `name`, `category`, `quantity`, `unitPrice`, `supplier`, `totalValue` (quantity × unitPrice — COMPUTED)
- `InventoryRepository` with: `findByCategory(String)`, `findBySupplier(String)`
- `InventoryService` handles CRUD + DTO mapping + queries
- `InventoryController` at `/api/inventory`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/inventory` → List of ResponseDTO (200)
- `GET /api/inventory/{id}` → ResponseDTO (200 or 404)
- `GET /api/inventory/category/{category}` → filter by category (200)
- `GET /api/inventory/supplier/{supplier}` → filter by supplier (200)
- `POST /api/inventory` → create (201)
- `PUT /api/inventory/{id}` → update (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/inventory/{id}` → delete (204 or 404)
hints: totalValue = quantity * unitPrice — compute in service during entity → DTO mapping
Entity + Repository + Service + DTO + Custom Queries
